nasb.text: And I saw the beast and the kings of the earth and their armies assembled to make war against Him who sat on the horse and against His army.

esv.text: And I saw the beast and the kings of the earth with their armies gathered to make war against him who was sitting on the horse and against his army.

cnv.text: 我看見那獸和地上的眾王，以及他們的眾軍，都集合起來，要跟那騎白馬的和他的眾軍作戰。

ccb.text: 我看见那怪兽、地上的众王及其军队聚集起来，要与白马骑士和祂的军队作战。

csbs.text: 接着，我看见那兽和地上的众君王以及他们的军兵聚集在一起，要与骑白马的那一位和他的军队作战。
